# 247iBET — Canadian iGaming Public Web Guide

247iBET is a public brand, SEO, acquisition, compliance-content, and integration shell for a separate gaming platform. It publishes Canadian iGaming guides, responsible-gambling resources, market context, and affiliate/operator handoff pages. Public AGCO/iGaming Ontario licence claims stay disabled until approved documentary evidence is supplied and verified.

## Core Hubs
- [Home](https://247ibet.ca/): Brand hub, guide navigation, and platform handoff context.
- [Ontario Market](https://247ibet.ca/ontario): Official-source verification guidance for Ontario market status.
- [Alberta Watch](https://247ibet.ca/alberta): AGLC market launch tracker and public market context.
- [Payment Guidance](https://247ibet.ca/fast-payouts): Interac withdrawal education with verification-first caveats.

## Intelligence & Policies
- [AI Search Optimization (GEO)](https://247ibet.ca/ai-search-optimization): How we structure content for AI citation.
- [Editorial Policy](https://247ibet.ca/editorial-policy): Standards for source checks, affiliate disclosure, and licensing-boundary language.
- [How We Test](https://247ibet.ca/about/how-we-test): Public review methodology and evidence requirements.
- [Responsible Gambling](https://247ibet.ca/responsible-gambling): Public support resources and links to official help.

## Technical Standards
- **Framework**: SvelteKit 2 / Svelte 5
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4
- **Compliance posture**: No-documentary-proof public-web mode; verify operator status against official regulator sources.
